channel.title: philosophy on errbufferoverfl
channel.description: Recent content in philosophy on errbufferoverfl

item.title: The Feminist and the Sex Offender
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: In the era of #MeToo and mass incarceration, The Feminist and the Sex Offender makes a powerful feminist case for accountability without punishment and sexual safety and pleasure without injustice.

item.title: Lost in Work Escaping Capitalism
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: ‘Work hard, get paid.’ It’s simple. Self-evident. But it’s also a lie—at least for most of us. For young people today, the old assumptions are crumbling; hard work in school no longer guarantees a secure, well-paying job in the future.

item.title: Revolution at Point Zero
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Written between 1974 and 2016, Revolution at Point Zero collects four decades of research and theorizing on the nature of housework, social reproduction, and women’s struggles on this terrain—to escape it, to better its conditions, to reconstruct it in ways that provide an alternative to capitalist relations.
